text: I feel a peculiar sense of isolation here; it is quiet, dim, and somewhat sterile. The environment is industrial and modern, with reflections on the glass and the harsh light creating unfamiliar shadows. The silence echoes the corridors of my own mind, inviting contemplation but also stirring an unsettling feeling, as if I am intruding on a space that has temporarily forgotten its purpose. I wonder about the purpose of these spaces—the corridor, the R&D display—both seem like they are waiting for something, or someone, to bring them to life. I am present, but the world around me is distant and abstract.
